routine_definition:
insert into summs_total (
    profile_puuid,
    spell, 
    casts
  )
  values (
    p_profile_puuid,
    p_spell,
    p_casts
  )
  on conflict (profile_puuid, spell)
  do update set
    casts = summs_total.casts + excluded.casts

BEGIN

  -- 🔵 LONGEST GAME
  INSERT INTO longest_sr_games (
    profile_puuid,
    champion,
    gameduration,
    kills,
    deaths,
    assists
  )
  VALUES (
    p_profile_puuid,
    p_champion,
    p_gameduration,
    p_kills,
    p_deaths,
    p_assists
  )
  ON CONFLICT (profile_puuid)
  DO UPDATE SET
    gameduration = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration > longest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR longest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.gameduration
      ELSE longest_sr_games.gameduration
    END,

    champion = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration > longest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR longest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.champion
      ELSE longest_sr_games.champion
    END,

    kills = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration > longest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR longest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.kills
      ELSE longest_sr_games.kills
    END,

    deaths = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration > longest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR longest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.deaths
      ELSE longest_sr_games.deaths
    END,

    assists = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration > longest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR longest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.assists
      ELSE longest_sr_games.assists
    END;


  -- 🔴 SHORTEST GAME
  INSERT INTO shortest_sr_games (
    profile_puuid,
    champion,
    gameduration,
    kills,
    deaths,
    assists
  )
  VALUES (
    p_profile_puuid,
    p_champion,
    p_gameduration,
    p_kills,
    p_deaths,
    p_assists
  )
  ON CONFLICT (profile_puuid)
  DO UPDATE SET
    gameduration = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration < shortest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR shortest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.gameduration
      ELSE shortest_sr_games.gameduration
    END,

    champion = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration < shortest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR shortest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.champion
      ELSE shortest_sr_games.champion
    END,

    kills = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration < shortest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR shortest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.kills
      ELSE shortest_sr_games.kills
    END,

    deaths = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration < shortest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR shortest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.deaths
      ELSE shortest_sr_games.deaths
    END,

    assists = CASE
      WHEN EXCLUDED.gameduration < shortest_sr_games.gameduration
        OR shortest_sr_games.gameduration IS NULL
      THEN EXCLUDED.assists
      ELSE shortest_sr_games.assists
    END;

END;

insert into per_champ_arena (
    profile_puuid,
    champion,

    e,
    r,

    assists,

    total_damage_taken,
    total_damage_shielded_on_teammates,
    damage_self_mitigated,
    total_heals_on_teammates,
    timeccingothers,
    missing_pings
  )
  values (
    p_profile_puuid,
    p_champion,
    p_wins,
    p_losses,
    p_q,
    p_w,
    p_e,
    p_r,
    p_k,
    p_d,
    p_a,
    p_largestKillingSpree,
    p_longestTImeSpentLiving,
    p_goldEarned,
    p_totalDamageDealtToChampions,
    p_totalDamageTaken,
    p_totalDamageShieldedOnTeammates,
    p_damageSelfMitigated,
    p_totalHealsOnTeammates,
    p_timeCCingOthers,
    p_missingPings
  )
  on conflict (profile_puuid, champion)
  do update set
    wins   = per_champ_arena.wins   + excluded.wins,
    losses = per_champ_arena.losses + excluded.losses,
    q = per_champ_arena.q + excluded.q,
    w = per_champ_arena.w + excluded.w,
    e = per_champ_arena.e + excluded.e,
    r = per_champ_arena.r + excluded.r,
    kills  = per_champ_arena.kills  + excluded.kills,
    deaths = per_champ_arena.deaths + excluded.deaths,
    assists = per_champ_arena.assists + excluded.assists,

    largest_killing_spree = GREATEST(
    per_champ_arena.largest_killing_spree,
    EXCLUDED.largest_killing_spree
    ),
    longesttimespentliving = GREATEST(
    per_champ_arena.longesttimespentliving,
    EXCLUDED.longesttimespentliving
    ),

    gold_earned = per_champ_arena.gold_earned + excluded.gold_earned,
    total_damage_dealt_to_champs = per_champ_arena.total_damage_dealt_to_champs + excluded.total_damage_dealt_to_champs,
    total_damage_taken = per_champ_arena.total_damage_taken + excluded.total_damage_taken,
    total_damage_shielded_on_teammates = per_champ_arena.total_damage_shielded_on_teammates + excluded.total_damage_shielded_on_teammates,
    damage_self_mitigated = per_champ_arena.damage_self_mitigated + excluded.damage_self_mitigated,
    total_heals_on_teammates = per_champ_arena.total_heals_on_teammates + excluded.total_heals_on_teammates,
    timeccingothers = per_champ_arena.timeccingothers + excluded.timeccingothers,
    missing_pings = per_champ_arena.missing_pings + excluded.missing_pings

INSERT INTO summs_total (
    profile_puuid,
    spell,
    casts
  )
  SELECT
    p_profile_puuid,
    (row->>'spell')::text,
    (row->>'casts')::bigint
  FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_summs_data) AS row
  ON CONFLICT (profile_puuid, spell)
  DO UPDATE SET
    casts = summs_total.casts + EXCLUDED.casts;

INSERT INTO arena_augments_selected (
    profile_puuid,
    augment,
    times_selected
  )
  SELECT
    p_profile_puuid,
    (row->>'augment')::text,
    (row->>'times_selected')::bigint
  FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_augment_data) AS row
  ON CONFLICT (profile_puuid, augment)
  DO UPDATE SET
    times_selected = arena_augments_selected.times_selected + EXCLUDED.times_selected;

INSERT INTO match_ids (
    profile_puuid,    
    match_id,
    gamemode,
    mapid,
    queueid,
    gametype
  )
  SELECT
    p_profile_puuid,
    (row->>'match_id')::text,
    (row->>'gamemode')::text,
    (row->>'mapid')::bigint,
    (row->>'queueid')::bigint,
    (row->>'gametype')::text
  FROM jsonb_array_elements(p_matchid_data) AS row
  ON CONFLICT (profile_puuid, match_id)
  DO UPDATE SET
    gamemode = EXCLUDED.gamemode,
    mapid = EXCLUDED.mapid,
    queueid = EXCLUDED.queueid,
    gametype = EXCLUDED.gametype

insert into roles_played (
    profile_puuid,
    role, 
    wins,
    losses
  )
  values (
    p_profile_puuid,
    p_role,
    p_wins,
    p_losses
  )
  on conflict (profile_puuid, role)
  do update set
    wins = roles_played.wins + excluded.wins,
    losses = roles_played.losses + excluded.losses

insert into arena_augments_selected (
    profile_puuid,

  on conflict (profile_puuid, augment)
  do update set
    times_selected = arena_augments_selected.times_selected + excluded.times_selected
